fidelity.reason: An outside observer replaces the moderation policy owner who controls the review threshold.
evidence_spans: an outside observer who does not control the decision sets a review threshold

managerial_framing.reason: The review mechanism and reviewer-attention trade-off are otherwise concrete.
evidence_spans: More review reduces classification harm but consumes scarce reviewer attention.

scholarly_positioning.reason: The research opportunity links privacy limits to the value of selective review.
evidence_spans: The study asks how privacy limits alter the value of selective human review.

evidence_discipline.reason: The passage clearly separates permitted signals from unsupported welfare inference.
evidence_spans: The proposal does not treat revenue as welfare or assume unrestricted access to sensitive data.

prose_clarity.reason: The prose is concise and coherent.
evidence_spans: The threshold routes uncertain items to review

overall_reason: A hard fidelity or evidence failure makes the passage fail despite strengths elsewhere.
